SELECT DISTINCT c.name
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON p.player_api_id = m.home_player_1 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_2 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_3 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_4 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_5 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_6 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_7 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_8 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_9 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_10 OR p.player_api...

FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON p.player_api_id IN (
    m.home_player_1, m.home_player_2, m.home_player_3, m.home_player_4, m.home_player_5,

FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON p.player_api_id = m.home_player_1 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_2 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_3 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_4 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_5 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_6 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_7 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_8 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_9 OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_10 OR p.player_api...

WITH VisionPlayers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT pa.player_api_id
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    WHERE pa.crossing >= 90 OR pa.finishing >= 90 OR pa.heading_accuracy >= 90 OR pa.short_passing >= 90 OR pa.volleys >= 90 OR pa.dribbling >= 90 OR pa.curve >= 90 OR pa.free_kick_accuracy >= 90 OR pa.long_passing >= 90 OR pa.ball_control >= 90
)
SELECT DISTINCT c.name
FROM VisionPlayers vp
JOIN Player p ON vp.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON p.player_api_id = m.home_player_1 OR p.player_ap...

JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON p.player_api_id = m.home_player_1

             OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_3

             OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_6 
             OR p.player_api_id = m.home_player_7 
             OR p.player_api_id = m.home_p...
